reason: Plan extends three existing files with additive, backward-compatible changes. No new modules, no new dependencies, no architectural shifts. The debug overlay, LoopDeps interface, ShaderErrorCollector, health gate, and quality tier infrastructure all already exist — this plan only wires existing data into the existing debug display path. The onDebugFrame optional-chain pattern ensures zero cost when debug is disabled. All new fields are non-identifying developer diagnostics (shader status, attribute names, quality tier), consistent with the privacy model. Estimated complexity of 'small' is accurate.
suggestions: Consider caching getOptionalAttrs results per mode transition rather than querying BufferGeometry every frame, even though the optional chain already gates execution to debug-only mode.

The shaderStatus getter in step 4 should capture the result at health-gate completion time rather than calling errorCollector.hasErrors() per frame, since shader compile status is a one-time startup check.
